## Comments

### Comment 1 - madhur13490

Hi @dtcxzyw , are you still planning to look at this issue?


---

### Comment 2 - dtcxzyw

With https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/157852, loading from a dead alloca is no longer UB. However, the hoisted load returns poison instead of undef. So it is still a miscompilation.

Currently, I am not working on this issue. Feel free to take this :)


---
